prestazioni: Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbo upgrade for the *G4KH* 2.0L Theta II turbocharged engine (stock turbo: TD04L-13T), paired with a PTP 3.5" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system featuring a 304-grade stainless steel downpipe with a 200-cell catalytic converter delete and a Borla Atak muffler for optimized spool and 350+ HP potential on E85 fuel with a Cobb Accessport Stage 2+ tune

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, 20-way adjustable front camber plates, and custom-valved monotube dampers for the Kona N's *Gamma II* platform, paired with Whiteline adjustable rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 90A durometer) for reduced body roll and improved turn-in response

Hyundai Motorsport high-pressure fuel pump (1,500+ HP rated) with Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors, a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup (with -10AN lines and Mishimoto X-Line hoses), and a PRL Motorsports intake manifold spacer to optimize airflow for the *G4KH* engine under forced induction, supported by a Vibrant 1250 intercooler core with 5.0" thick end tanks for IAT reduction under sustained boost
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the Kona N (2022+ facelift models), featuring carbon fiber fenders with integrated canards, a vented hood with a 3M matte black wrap, and a custom rear diffuser with integrated dual-exit exhaust cutouts for the PTP turbo-back system, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber roof for weight reduction

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2 wheels (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) in Hyper Silver finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) for optimized grip, with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) to fill the Rocket Bunny fender gaps and a set of Muteki SR48 lug nuts for secure fitment

Custom front splitter from Varis Japan, constructed from 3K twill carbon fiber with an adjustable angle of attack (0-5 degrees) for aerodynamic balance, paired with a Cusco rear wing (Type 2, 1,200mm width) in raw carbon fiber, mounted on a custom aluminum pedestal with Gurney flap for high-speed stability, and a full 3M Satin Black vinyl wrap with Hyundai N Performance decals in Electric Blue
